ddls:
CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lab and its purpose */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the lab */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the lab (e.g., Physics, Chemistry) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lab was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lab was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lab (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "lab_id" TEXT /* Reference to the lab that hosts the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "tutorial" TEXT /* Tutorial content for the experiment */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the experiment (e.g., Interactive, Simulation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., Development, Testing, Deployed) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the experiment (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration to complete the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the requirement applies to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the requirement was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the requirement (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_steps" (
  "test_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test step */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the test step applies to */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the test step */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test step was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test step was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test step */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner responsible for the test step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the test case applies to */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of test case (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test case (e.g., Inprogress, Passed, Failed) */,
  "test_case_owner" TEXT /* Owner responsible for the test case */,
  "pre_conditions" TEXT /* Preconditions required for the test case */,
  "post_conditions" TEXT /* Postconditions expected after the test case */,
  "data_environment" TEXT /* Data and environment required for the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the test case was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case */,
  "test_case_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration for the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_steps_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "test_step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test step */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_mapping_test_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_step_id") REFERENCES test_steps ("test_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_mapping_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, interact, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used to access the experiment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the feedback is about */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was last updated */,
  "resolved" TEXT /* Whether the feedback has been resolved (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the version applies to */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change record was last updated */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Fix, Update, New Feature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dev_team" (
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "dev_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., backend, frontend, full-stack) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the developer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the developer account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the developer's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the developer account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_logs" (
  "review_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., Approved, Rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was conducted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review log was last updated */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., Code, Content, Usability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_logs_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES dev_team ("dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployment" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date of deployment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the experiment is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment record was last updated */,
  "deployed_by" TEXT /* User who deployed the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the analytics applies to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., usage, performance) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., User, System) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permission applies to */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the permission applies to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  "granted_by" TEXT /* User who granted the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the notification is about */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, performance, test) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
